title: Update Disabled User Notice Message
story: As a disabled shared user, I want to see a polite notice explaining that my access has been disabled, so that I know to contact my administrator for re-activation.
description: Update the message shown to disabled users when they try to access a shared account. Replace 'Rejected' header with 'Notice' and update the message body to: 'Your team user account has been disabled. Please contact your DataTools Pro or Salesforce administrator. If you need help or believe you have received this message in error, we are here to help at support@datatoolspro.com'
acceptance_criteria: Disabled user message header reads 'Notice' instead of 'Rejected'
Message body provides clear next steps and contact information
Message is displayed when a disabled user selects the shared account
ux_changes: Updated disabled user message with softer tone — 'Notice' header and constructive next steps.
comment_summary: Developer requested clarification, then updated the message text. Deployed to staging.
